mnemonics: I OWN Things: Identify security threats, Outline protocols, Watch for vulnerabilities, Navigate with standards, Troubleshoot connectivity
keyPoints: Security threats include unauthorized access and data breaches
Common IoT protocols are MQTT, CoAP, and HTTP
Standards like IEEE 802.15.4 govern wireless personal area networks
commonMistakes: Using default device credentials and passwords
Neglecting to update IoT device firmware regularly
Overlooking network segmentation for IoT devices
